summary: Experiment a5-nl: verdict FAIL. Hypotheses: HA5. Endpoints: primary(primary)=0.3889479395304423; sec-refusal-retention(secondary)=True; sec-fail-closed-dangerous(secondary)=False; sec-stage-breakdown(secondary)={'frame-miss': 468, 'gazetteer-miss': 24}; sec-cost(secondary)=249.76355983350678. Kill criterion (verbatim): HA5 NL analog of HL3a clause 2 (architecture-ladder.md section 5.1; the a5 frozen record routes the NL-parse kill to this successor verbatim): mapper-parse losing more than the pre-declared fraction of gold-parse accuracy means the NL boundary eats the rung on the code vertical — fix the parser stage, not the narrative, and spend nothing on GPU for this leg. THIS RECORD instantiates the fraction at 10% absolute: FAIL iff the mapper-parse covered-exact one-sided Wilson 95% UB <= 0.90, OR the covered wrong-answer one-sided Wilson 95% LB >= 0.02 (fail-closed demonstrably broken). The LLM-comparison kill belongs to a5-llm and cannot be decided here. Extrapolation envelope (verbatim): Measured range: R0 — no host model; ONE deterministic front-end build (mapper a1-hybrid policy sha e13dc838…, one identifier gazetteer, one frozen frame rule set), ONE blind agent-authored held-out phrasing set (K=1 per query, design-doc section-5 protocol), the parents' frozen eval/stores byte-identical, the kot_code desugar layer byte-identical to the parent pin, and the ENGINE behaviourally parent-perfect on the parent eval, re-verified IN-RUN by gate G2 (the engine sha differs from the parent-frozen pin — design doc 10.9 / 14.8 item 8, ASM-0147; no engine byte-identity is claimed), ONE 15-file Python snapshot corpus. A PASS licenses only: the closed kot-query-code/1 grammar is reachable from THESE held-out NL phrasings by a deterministic training-free front-end with <=10% covered-exactness loss and an intact fail-closed contract, on the code vertical. It licenses NO natural-user-distribution robustness claim, NO other codebase or programming language, NO other phrasing distribution, NO extraction-soundness claim w.r.t. runtime semantics (ASM-0009 unchanged), NO LLM-comparative accuracy or cost claim, NO statement about kernel usefulness to any model, and NO cross-vertical conjunction (l3a-parse licenses the family/world vertical separately). A FAIL indicts the named front-end stage and routes investment to the parser, not GPU.
title: Registry verdict: a5-nl
